name: mojo-extensor-view-contract
description: Documents the ExTensor view/owner contract for Mojo ML frameworks, covering refcount mechanics, view-returning operations, as_contiguous() guard patterns, and markdown table linting fixes. Use when: (1) documenting shared-ownership tensor semantics in Mojo, (2) fixing MD060 table-column-style linting errors, (3) expanding view contract docs with refcount lifecycle details.
